title: Redesign FilterTabs.jsx — solid border indicator on selected tab, mono uppercase labels
acceptance_criteria: Remove sliding pill indicator (the animated <span> with width/height transforms)
Replace with: selected tab gets a solid 1px bottom-border or full border in accent red (--color-accent)
All tab labels: uppercase, JetBrains Mono font, 0.7rem-0.875rem size, tracking 0.05em
Remove rounded-full from all tab buttons and container
border-radius: 0 on FilterTabs container and FilterTab buttons
Remove shadow-glow and all shadow tokens
Keep keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right, Home/End, role='tablist') intact
Keep focus-visible ring in accent red
Active tab: red border, white text; Inactive: hairline border, muted text
